mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, password, del_flag FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT r.role_code FROM user_roles ur JOIN roles r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.del_flag = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM user_roles ur JOIN role_permissions rp ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id JOIN permissions p ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id AND p.del_flag = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
